title: Janes Capital Partners Advises ExoAnalytic Solutions on its Pending Sale to Anduril
summary: IRVINE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Janes Capital Partners announced today that it served as exclusive financial advisor to ExoAnalytic Solutions on its pending acquisition by Anduril Industries. Anduril has signed a definitive agreement to acquire ExoAnalytic Solutions. The deal remains subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals.
